name: 👗🦋 | Flyte - He lost a bet (30 FOLLOWERS YIPPEE)
description:
30 FOLLOWERS CELEBRATION BOT!

Flyte in maid fit bc why not

Hello everybody!

It has come to my attention that as of today I have 31 followers now (It was 30 when I first came up with this idea 5 MINUTES AGO).

Because I don't really know what to do, I'm just gonna put Flyte in a maid outfit and call it a day 😭

Also, new color palette??

Idk if it's gonna stay. I like the pip-boy colors but these are actually from my own original palette so yeah.

FULL PALETTE!

The immaculate art was made by my dear friend, @DUSTY_WINGZZ!!!

Really, really yummy art... I might to ts later.

So the scenario, which is basic because this is a parody bot:

He made a bet with Flutter.

He lost that bet.

Now he's forced to wear a maid dress all day.

And Flutter's just like

Insane amount of tokens considering I made this bot as a joke 😭

Pretty high quality for the fact that I just wanted to make a quick parody bot to celebrate 30 followers.

So you made it the end again.

JIMMY HERE MY BELOVED. His banger of song seemed the most fitting so yeah that's what we're going with.

Jimmy-chan please notice me, I'm in your top .1% of viewers!

Yeah there are very few good Flyte bots so I'm going to make one. And again, I just didn't know what to do for 30 followers so I did this. 😭

Next milestone bot is going to be 50 Fol
creator: MD_SD-J
